mapper.select: SELECT EVAL_YN AS "evalYn", PRICE_WEIGHT AS "priceWeight", PRICE_METHOD AS "priceMethod" FROM RX_RFX WHERE ID=#{rfxId}
mapper.update: UPDATE RX_RFX SET EVAL_YN=NVL(#{evalYn},'N'), PRICE_WEIGHT=NVL(#{priceWeight},0), PRICE_METHOD=NVL(#{priceMethod},'MR'), MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{rfxId}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, RFX_ID, LINE_NO, CRITERIA_NM, WEIGHT, REMARK FROM RX_EVAL_CRITERIA WHERE RFX_ID=#{rfxId} ORDER BY LINE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RX_EVAL_CRITERIA (RFX_ID, LINE_NO, CRITERIA_NM, WEIGHT, REMARK, REG_ID) VALUES (#{rfxId}, #{lineNo}, #{criteriaNm}, NVL(#{weight},0), #{remark}, 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select: SELECT ID, RFX_ID, USR_ID, USR_NM FROM RX_EVALUATOR WHERE RFX_ID=#{rfxId} ORDER BY ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RX_EVALUATOR (RFX_ID, USR_ID, USR_NM, REG_ID) VALUES (#{rfxId}, #{usrId}, #{usrNm}, 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select: SELECT ID, RFX_ID, VD_CD, CRITERIA_ID, EVALUATOR_ID, SCORE FROM RX_EVAL_SCORE WHERE RFX_ID=#{rfxId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RX_EVAL_SCORE (RFX_ID, VD_CD, CRITERIA_ID, EVALUATOR_ID, SCORE, REG_ID) VALUES (#{rfxId}, #{vdCd}, #{criteriaId}, #{evaluatorId}, NVL(#{score},0), 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select: SELECT V.VD_CD AS "vdCd", V.VD_NM AS "vdNm", NVL(Q.AMT,0) AS "quoteAmt" FROM RX_RFX_VENDOR V LEFT JOIN ( SELECT VD_CD, SUM(OFFER_AMT) AS AMT FROM RX_QUOTE_ITEM WHERE RFX_ID=#{rfxId} GROUP BY VD_CD ) Q ON Q.VD_CD = V.VD_CD WHERE V.RFX_ID=#{rfxId} ORDER BY V.VD_CD
